items.caption: An animated character with a serious expression, looking directly at the viewer. the character has brown hair and is wearing a dark-colored outfit. in the background, there is a blurred image of a building, suggesting an urban setting. overlaying the image is text that reads, "your reaction when someone says, anime is cartoons. same reaction when someone says, 'i watch manga' i love anime, all anime, awesome anime, anime stuff, otaku anime, manga anime, anime art, funny anime pics, otaku issues." the text is in a casual, informal font style, and it seems to be a humorous take on the reaction of anime fans when someone dismisses anime as cartoons or when someone mentions manga.
